name: KrillApp.Project.Journal
title: Journal
description: Stores chronological journal entries within a project. Entries can include text and photos to document progress, milestones, decisions, and observations over time. Useful for keeping a running log of project activity.
shortDescription: Chronological journal for documenting project progress and observations.
llmPurpose: Stores chronological journal entries with text and photos to document project progress and observations over time.
llmCreationHints: Create a Journal when the user wants to maintain a chronological record of project events, observations, or decisions.

llmConnectionHints.role: leaf state node that stores journal entries

llmExamples: Start a journal for this project.
Add a journal entry about today's sensor readings.
Document the setup process in a journal.
